_note: MOCK connector payloads shaped like what a real PMS (Mews / Cloudbeds / SiteMinder) 'today's occupancy' endpoint would return, so the 'Connect PMS' button in the demo can simulate a live integration without real partner credentials. Swap `mockFetchPmsOccupancy()` in app.js for a real OAuth-authenticated fetch to the partner's API using this same shape.
